name: Festive Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese, packed brown sugar, cinnamon, ground ginger, salt, and ground cloves until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the mashed pumpkin, milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the pre-baked pie shell.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F (190°C) oven for 45-50 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool slightly on a wire rack.
7. In a separate bowl, beat together the sour cream and sugar until smooth.
8. Spread the topping evenly over the warm pie.
9. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 3-5 minutes or until the topping is set.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
